trades.reasoning: Score 95 with all four required signals — RSI 64.3 (bullish zone, not overbought), MACD crossover with rising histogram, and price well above SMA-20 — on a risk-on day with $577 cash available and 4 open slots.

decisions.briefing: Markets are in risk-on mode today (NASDAQ +1.4%, S&P +0.7%), giving a clear signal to deploy the remaining cash into a high-conviction setup. WOLF leads the screener with a perfect 95 score and all four confirmation signals — MACD crossover, rising histogram, RSI in the bullish zone at 64.3, and price 10% above SMA-20 — without being overbought. All six existing positions are held; stop-losses and profit targets continue working automatically.

market_education.summary_en: Equities closed June on a positive note as the S&P 500 gained 0.7% and the NASDAQ rose 1.4%, driven by continued momentum in technology and growth stocks heading into the end of Q2. Quarter-end rebalancing by institutional funds added buying pressure as managers repositioned toward outperforming sectors. Semiconductors and AI-adjacent names led the session, reflecting ongoing confidence in the technology spending cycle.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股在六月最後一個交易日以正面格局收盤，標普500上漲0.7%，納斯達克指數上揚1.4%，科技與成長股持續帶動大盤走強。季末機構資金的倉位再平衡為市場提供了額外買盤，基金經理積極增持表現強勢的板塊。半導體及AI相關類股領漲，反映市場對科技資本支出週期的持續信心。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Multi-signal confirmation means waiting for several independent technical indicators to agree before entering a trade — for example, requiring MACD crossover, RSI in a bullish zone, and price above the SMA-20 all at once. Relying on a single indicator produces many false signals; stacking multiple signals filters out noise and suggests that institutional money, not just retail momentum, is behind a move.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 多重訊號確認，是指等待多個獨立技術指標同時發出一致信號後才進場的交易原則，例如要求MACD出現黃金交叉、RSI處於多頭動能區間，且股價同步站上20日均線。單一指標容易產生大量假訊號；多重指標疊加能有效過濾雜訊，通常代表背後有機構資金而非純粹散戶追漲的支撐。
